description: CIA-based damage scenario templates for automotive assets. Each template generates a damage scenario when the corresponding CIA property is rated Medium or High.

confidentiality.description_template: An attacker gains unauthorized access to {asset_name}, leading to exposure of sensitive {asset_type} data within the {product_name} system.
Proprietary {asset_type} information from {asset_name} is exfiltrated, compromising trade secrets or calibration data of the {product_name}.

integrity.description_template: An attacker tampers with {asset_name} ({asset_type}), causing the {product_name} to operate with corrupted data or logic, potentially leading to unsafe behavior.
False or manipulated data is injected into {asset_name}, causing downstream systems in {product_name} to make decisions based on incorrect information.

availability.description_template: An attacker renders {asset_name} ({asset_type}) unavailable, causing loss of function in the {product_name} system.
Partial disruption of {asset_name} causes degraded operation of {product_name}, potentially affecting safety-critical functions.
